summary: Completed comprehensive testing of United Hands Foundation NGO platform iteration 2. All 31 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all requested features: QR code displays correctly on donate page, donation approval/rejection works with auth token, logo size is correct (w-16 h-16), no Admin Login link anywhere, MongoDB Atlas connected and persisting data, unified login redirects admin to dashboard.

issues: Gallery images with TEST_ prefix show broken images due to example.com URLs from test data - these are test artifacts, not production data

action_items: Clean up TEST_ prefixed gallery images from database (test artifacts with example.com URLs)
seed_data_creation: Test donations created during pytest with TEST_ prefix for approval/rejection testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working: 1) QR code shows actual image from /api/site-assets/qr_code (Cloudinary URL), 2) Donation approval via POST /api/donations/approve with Bearer token works - status changes to 'approved' and receipt number generated, 3) Donation rejection works similarly, 4) Logo size is w-16 h-16 in navbar, 5) No 'Admin Login' link in footer or login page, 6) MongoDB Atlas connected (data persists), 7) Unified login: admin at /login redirects to /uhf-admin/dashboard, 8) Homepage shows founder photos and gallery images from site_assets, 9) Projects and Gallery CRUD work with auth. Note: Resend email has placeholder key so emails won't send but approval still works.
features_verified: QR code image displays on donate page (fetched from /api/site-assets/qr_code)
Donation approval works: admin can approve pending donation via POST /api/donations/approve with auth token
Donation rejection works: admin can reject pending donation
Logo size is w-16 h-16 for sm size in navbar (verified via class attribute)
No 'Admin Login' link/button on login page
MongoDB Atlas connected - all data persists across requests
Unified login: admin at /login gets role=admin and redirects to /uhf-admin/dashboard
Homepage shows founder photos from site_assets
Homepage Heartiest Moments section displays gallery images
Projects CRUD works with auth (create, read, update, delete)
Gallery CRUD works with auth (create, read, update, delete)
Admin dashboard shows pending/approved donation counts
Admin dashboard approve button updates donation status and generates receipt number

mocked_apis.Resend Email API: Has placeholder key (re_placeholder) - emails won't send but approval status changes correctly
